summary: Frontend testing of quote widgets feature on home dashboard. All requested features working correctly: home page loads without blank screen, Water Quote Widget and Sales Quote Widget both visible above the fold (at ~178px from top), contemporary theme styling applied with gradient backgrounds and shadows.
passed_tests: Login flow works - redirects to /home after successful login with admin@nylaairwater.earth
Home page loads correctly without blank screen - shows 'Good evening, System' greeting
Water Quote Widget displayed with 'DAILY WATER WISDOM' header and daily quote (H.P. Lovecraft quote on test date)
Sales Quote Widget displayed with 'DAILY SALES INSPIRATION' header and daily quote (Jim Cathcart quote on test date)
Both widgets positioned at ~178px from top - clearly visible without scrolling on 1080p viewport
Widgets use contemporary theme styling: bg-gradient-to-br, shadow-lg, hover:shadow-xl, backdrop-blur-sm
Water widget has cyan/sky/blue gradient theme with animated water wave SVG background
Sales widget has amber/orange/rose gradient theme with animated sparkle effects
Both widgets have gradient top accent bars and decorative icons
Dashboard data loads: Today's Summary (4 stat cards), Action Items, Upcoming Meetings, Pipeline, Recent Activity
data-testid attributes present: home-dashboard, water-quote-widget, sales-quote-widget
critical_code_review_comments: HomeDashboard.js (line 398-402): Quote widgets correctly positioned in grid section immediately after header, using 'mb-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4' for responsive layout
WaterQuoteWidget.js: Uses day-of-year based quote selection (31 quotes rotate daily)
SalesQuoteWidget.js: Uses day-of-year + 15 offset to show different quote than water widget
Both widgets have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Weather widget shows 'unavailable' due to Open-Meteo rate limiting - expected behavior as noted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote widgets feature fully implemented and tested. Widgets positioned right after header section (line 398-402 in HomeDashboard.js). Both widgets change daily based on day of year. Weather widget may show 'unavailable' due to Open-Meteo API rate limiting.

feature_verification.blank_screen_fix: VERIFIED - Page loads correctly, no blank screen
feature_verification.water_quote_widget: VERIFIED - Displays daily water wisdom with cyan theme
feature_verification.sales_quote_widget: VERIFIED - Displays daily sales inspiration with orange theme
feature_verification.widgets_above_fold: VERIFIED - Both at ~178px, well within 1080px viewport
feature_verification.contemporary_styling: VERIFIED - Gradient backgrounds, shadows, animations, backdrop-blur
